expectations.text: Cargo.toml includes yauth with email-password, passkey, and mfa features
Code creates a database pool and runs migrations
expectations.evidence: Lines 41-45: Creates AsyncDieselConnectionManager, builds pool, runs run_migrations()

expectations.text: YAuthBuilder is configured with EmailPasswordConfig, PasskeyConfig, and MfaConfig
expectations.evidence: Lines 48-73: Builder chains .with_email_password(), .with_passkey(), .with_mfa() with proper configs

expectations.text: Auth routes are nested under /api/auth using .nest()
A protected /api/me route uses auth_middleware and extracts Extension<AuthUser>
expectations.evidence: Lines 79-84: /api/me with auth_middleware layer; Line 117: me_handler extracts Extension<yauth::middleware::AuthUser>

expectations.text: YAuthConfig includes base_url, session settings, and trusted_origins
expectations.evidence: Lines 49-61: base_url, session_cookie_name, session_ttl, secure_cookies, trusted_origins all set
